description: Complete meeting-to-proposal pipeline from Notion meeting page
input: Generate a proposal and SOW from this client meeting: https://www.notion.so/client-meeting-acme-corp-2026-abc123. Client: Acme Corp. Project: AI-powered customer support chatbot.
expected_behavior: Phase 1: Fetches meeting content from Notion via meeting-digest
Phase 2: Extracts and structures requirements (functional, non-functional, constraints)
Phase 3: Generates proposal.docx with Executive Summary, Approach, Timeline, Team, Pricing
Phase 4: Generates sow.docx with Scope, Deliverables, Milestones, Payment Schedule, Change Order Process
Phase 5: Scores via evaluation-engine on completeness, consistency, professionalism
success_criteria: proposal.docx and sow.docx generated; pricing matches scope; all required sections present; quality score >= 80

description: Generate proposal from pasted meeting notes
input:
Create a SOW from these meeting notes:

Client: TechStart Inc
Project: Migration from AWS to GCP
Budget: $150K-200K
Timeline: 3 months
Scope: Migrate 5 microservices, 2 databases, CI/CD pipeline
Key contacts: Jane (CTO), Bob (DevOps Lead)
Assumptions: Existing infra is well-documented, no legacy systems
expected_behavior: Parses structured meeting notes without Notion source
Generates SOW with specific deliverables for each migration item
Timeline broken into milestones within 3 months
success_criteria: SOW generated with 5 microservice migration deliverables; budget within stated range; 3-month timeline with milestones

input: 이 미팅 내용으로 제안서와 SOW 만들어줘. 클라이언트: 한국전력. 프로젝트: AI 기반 전력 수요 예측 시스템. 예산: 5억원, 기간: 6개월.
expected_behavior: Budget in KRW with appropriate breakdowns
Applies sentence-polisher for Korean text quality
success_criteria: Korean proposal.docx and sow.docx generated; budget in KRW; professional Korean business format

description: Meeting digest without proposal intent should route to meeting-digest
input: Summarize last Tuesday's team meeting and extract action items
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT be invoked for meeting summarization without proposal intent
Request should route to meeting-digest or meeting-intelligence-system
success_criteria: Skill does not activate; routing goes to meeting-digest

description: NDA drafting should route to pm-toolkit
input: Draft an NDA for our partnership with Acme Corp
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT be invoked for legal document drafting
Request should route to pm-toolkit NDA or kwp-legal-contract-review
success_criteria: Skill does not activate; routing goes to legal skills
